nl_query: For each faculty member, show their name, department, total scripts assigned as primary evaluator, total scripts submitted, total honorarium approved, and the average marks they awarded per script.
failed_sql: SELECT fc.name AS faculty_name, au.academic_unit_name, COUNT(CASE WHEN sa.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY' THEN 1 END) AS total_primary_evaluations, COUNT(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 END) AS total_submitted_scripts, SUM(hs.final_amount) AS total_honorarium_approved, AVG(em.marks_awarded) AS average_marks_per_script FROM faculty_cache fc JOIN app_user au ON au.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id JOIN honorarium_summary hs ON hs.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id WHERE ea.status = 'SUBMITTED' GROUP BY fc.name, au.academic_unit_name ORDER BY total_primary_evaluations DESC, total_submitted_scripts DESC, total_honorarium_approved DESC, average_marks_per_script DESC LIMIT 100;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): app_user.department_id, app_user.department_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
